creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
mezz@FreeBSD.org writes:

> Synopsis: [patch] graphics/gimp-app: do not depend on -lexecinfo, it's unused
>
> State-Changed-From-To: open->closed
> State-Changed-By: mezz
> State-Changed-When: Sun Dec 30 06:18:47 UTC 2012
> State-Changed-Why: 
> It looks like the current gimp-app in ports tree no longer has get_backtrace()
> in the app/base/base-utils.c.
>

My patch is against gimp-2.8 in marcuscom repo. Speaking of which, why
ports/163519 wasn't applied there?
